name: 📋 Weekly Standup with AI Summary — Telegram + Google Sheets

assignments.name: question_1
assignments.value: ✅ What did you accomplish last week?

parameters.content:
## Step 5: Deliver Summary

Sends the AI-generated summary to the team lead via Telegram with per-person updates, blockers, and action items.

## 📋 Weekly Standup with AI Summary

### How it works
1. Fires every Monday at 9:00 AM and sends standup questions to each team member via Telegram.
2. Logs sent messages to Google Sheets for tracking.
3. Waits 4 hours for team members to reply.
4. Fetches all responses from Telegram using the Bot API.
5. Sends all replies to Groq AI (free) to generate a structured summary.
6. Delivers the AI summary to the team lead via Telegram.

### Setup steps
- [ ] Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and note the bot token
- [ ] Get each team member's Telegram chat ID (via @userinfobot)
- [ ] Get a free Groq API key at [console.groq.com](https://console.groq.com)
- [ ] Create a Google Sheet for logging sent standups
- [ ] Configure the Settings node with team member IDs, questions, and lead chat ID
- [ ] Connect Telegram and Google Sheets credentials to the workflow nodes

### Customization
- Change the schedule (default: Monday 9 AM) in the trigger node
- Edit standup questions in the Settings node
- Adjust the wait time (default: 4 hours) in the Wait node
- Modify the AI summary prompt to focus on blockers, priorities, or action items

## Step 1: Trigger & Settings

Fires every Monday at 9 AM. Edit **⚙️ Settings** to configure team chat IDs, names, standup questions, and API keys.
Use **▶️ Manual Test** to run anytime.

## Step 2: Send & Log

Builds personalized standup messages for each team member, sends them via Telegram, and logs the delivery in Google Sheets for tracking.

## Step 3: Wait

Pauses for **4 hours** to give the team time to reply.
⚠️ For testing, change to 2 minutes.

## Step 4: Collect & AI Summary

Fetches Telegram replies via Bot API, then sends all responses to Groq (free LLM) which generates a summary with key themes, blockers, and action items.
